title: CC: Retextured
description: Advanced Peripherals inspired textures for CC:Tweaked
body:
This Resource Pack adds textures to CC:Tweaked that were inspired by Advanced Peripherals, replacing the yellow color palette with modern looking blue. 
All advanced machines use the new blue, as well as black and gray instead of stone. Modems have been improved and cables now fit much better.
Inventorys of all advanced machines have been tinted blue and fit better to the looks of the machine, like advanced computers.
